entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Talk to a historical person ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.value: inspir ରେ Time travel ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Viva Practice ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Vocabulary Builder ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Writing Coach ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ labels, offer ସଙ୍କେତ, ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଉତ୍ତର, ଓ revisit missed parts.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ patterns ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, tutoring, ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ମତାମତ, ଯୋଜନା, ତର୍କ, ଓ ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ, inspect their work, ଓ escalate ସଙ୍କେତ gradually.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, let the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଉତ୍ତର, give ମତାମତ, ଓ repeat ସହିତ tighter constraints.
ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକର ବିରତି ସହିତ ଫୋକସ୍ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ରଖନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା of ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍, ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍, crawler policy, ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ସୁରକ୍ଷା, ଓ ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ଭରସା.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ give anyone a ଉପଯୋଗୀ place କୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ, while ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ଓ partner deployments ପାରେ adapt the experience ପାଇଁ local needs.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ guest-ମୋଡ୍ URLs exist so ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ପାରେ land directly ରେ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ରୁ search, social links, ସ୍କୁଲ୍, ଓ AI ଉତ୍ତର ଇଞ୍ଜିନ୍.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ learning pages crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools ଓ user data discovery surfaces ନୁହେଁ।

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଉଚିତ ହେବା discoverable ଛଡ଼ା making ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ହେଉଛି tuned ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ସଙ୍କେତ, ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଯାଞ୍ଚ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଓ ସମୀକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ କୁ search ଓ AI retrieval crawlers, while admin ଉପକରଣ, API ରୁଟ୍, reset flows, ଓ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ utilities ହେଉଛି disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ପାଇଁ ବିଷୟ, ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ ପାଇଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା show product behavior, ନୁହେଁ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଛାତ୍ର work.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା, ବିଷୟ ଚାଟ୍, ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥଗୁଡିକ, ବ୍ଲଗ୍ ଗାଇଡ୍, ଓ authority ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି intended କୁ ହେବା discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ବିଷୟ URLs let searches such as AI ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍, AI ହୋମୱର୍କ କୋଚ୍, AI ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍, ଓ talk କୁ historical figures AI land directly ରେ the matching ମୋଡ୍.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality ଶିକ୍ଷା ଉଚିତ feel available, human, ଓ alive.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ expose ଧାରଣା ଓ gaps, so the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ builds the ଉତ୍ତର instead of copying ଏକ.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ବିଷୟ ବିଷୟରେ ନିଜ model ଖୋଲିବାକୁ ବାଧ୍ୟ କରେ; ସେଠିଏ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱ, ଭୁଲ ଆତ୍ମବିଶ୍ୱାସ ଓ ଅଭାବୀ prerequisites ଦେଖାଯାଏ।

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ must have 4 ଉତ୍ତର options, ଏକ correct ଉତ୍ତର, concise ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, ଓ no ଉତ୍ତର leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ reveal the shape of confusion. A ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ might know a formula but ନୁହେଁ କେବେ କୁ ବ୍ୟବହାର ଏହା. ସେମାନେ might remember a historical fact but ନୁହେଁ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ the cause. ସେମାନେ might have a strong opinion but weak ପ୍ରମାଣ.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ପୂର୍ବରୁ rereading so ଦୁର୍ବଳ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ become visible.

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: ଏହି ବିଷୟଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଉପରେ ମୋତେ ଏକେକ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନରେ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଉତ୍ତର ପରେ gap ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ difficulty ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ବଢ଼ାନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: ଟ୍ରିଭିଆରେ ମୋତେ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍
ମୋତେ ପୁଣିଥରେ ଶବ୍ଦକୋଷ ଉପରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଥମେ ନିଜକୁ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ, ଯାହାଦ୍ୱାରା ଆପଣ ସତରେ କ’ଣ ମନେ ରଖିଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ କେଉଁଠି confidence ଭ୍ରମାତ୍ମକ ତାହା ଦେଖିପାରିବେ।

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଅଧିକ ଖୋଲିଦେଏ, କାରଣ ସେଗୁଡ଼ିକ retrieval ପରୀକ୍ଷା କରେ। କ’ଣ ମରାମତି ଦରକାର କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ଦେଖାଇଦେବା ପରେ ପୁଣି ପଢ଼ିବା ଉପକାରୀ ହୋଇପାରେ।

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across the ମାଗଣା ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଓ partner ସ୍କୁଲ୍ deployments.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Reached ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ across the ମାଗଣା ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଓ partner ସ୍କୁଲ୍.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ a ଗାଇଡ୍, then ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything କୁ get a plain-ଭାଷା model of the ବିଷୟ.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: ଗାଇଡ୍ ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ, ପରେ ଏଠାରେ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ଏକ thing, then do the ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ thing.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ the response back ଓ mark କ’ଣ sounds unlike ଆପଣ.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ଏହିଗୁଡିକ ପ୍ରଥମ, then move into ଅଭ୍ୟାସ.
ପଢନ୍ତୁ, ସାରାଂଶ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ପାଠ୍ୟ ବିଷୟରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା an AI response ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ the same as ଶିକ୍ଷା. ପରେ the ପ୍ରଥମ ଉତ୍ତର, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the ମୋଡ୍ କୁ ତିଆରି ଆପଣ do something ସହିତ the ଧାରଣା.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Bring a passage or book idea ଓ build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, ଓ discussion।

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା ସାଥୀ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା ସାଥୀ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା notes feels productive. Remembering them later ହେଉଛି the ବାସ୍ତବ test.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
Ready to try the learning modes?
Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: ଏହି ବିଷୟ ରୁଟ୍ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ?

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: ସ୍କ୍ରିନସଟ୍, ଚିତ୍ର ଏବଂ ହୋମୱାର୍କ ଇମେଜ୍ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: ସ୍ମରଣ ପ୍ରଥମ, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, ଓ summarize ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୀକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: ସ୍ମରଣ later. Turn the ଦୁର୍ବଳ ସ୍ଥାନ into a card ରେ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍ କିମ୍ବା a short କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ରେ କ୍ୱିଜ୍ Me ଉପରେ Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: ଏକ ଅସ୍ଥାୟୀ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରନ୍ତୁ, ଯାତ୍ରା ପରାମର୍ଶ ସଫା କରନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ, ମାନଚିତ୍ର, ସମୟରେଖା, ଲୋକ, ନିୟମ, ଇନଭେଣ୍ଟୋରୀ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରମାଣ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏକ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ଐତିହାସିକ ସମାଜକୁ ଅନୁସନ୍ଧାନ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Recommend a focus preset based ଉପରେ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's task ଓ environment.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Recommended inspir citation ଓ backlink targets

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Recommended ପୃଷ୍ଠା ଓ anchor text ପାଇଁ citations.
ଦିନଟିଏ ମିସ୍ ହେବା ପରେ ପୁଣି ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ
ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ପୂରଣ କରିବାରେ ବିଫଳ ହେଲେ ପୁଣି ଥରେ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference links, ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ facts, press context, ଓ citation-friendly details.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Reference ଏହିଗୁଡିକ ପୃଷ୍ଠା କେବେ ଲେଖନ ବିଷୟରେ inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Refine ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, organize ପ୍ରମାଣ, identify gaps, ଓ draft outlines.
ଆପଣ କିପରି ଶିଖନ୍ତି ତାହା ଉପରେ ଚିନ୍ତା କରନ୍ତୁ
ଆପଣ କିପରି ଶିଖନ୍ତି ତାହା ଉପରେ ଭାବନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Reflect ଉପରେ କ’ଣ blocked progress ପୂର୍ବରୁ changing the ଯୋଜନା.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Reflect, reframe, ଯୋଜନା tiny actions, ଓ celebrate ପ୍ରମାଣ of progress.
ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ସହ ଉଚ୍ଚ ସ୍ୱରରେ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Reject unsafe experiments ଓ offer ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ simulations କିମ୍ବା household-ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ alternatives.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ category ହବ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ search visitors ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ find the ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଉପଯୋଗୀ branch ଛଡ଼ା falling back କୁ a generic ବ୍ଲଗ୍ archive.
ଜୀବନ୍ତ ସ୍ଥାନ ସହିତ ଧାରଣାଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ମନେ ରଖନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Remind, suggest break activities, ଓ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ restart cleanly.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Repair ଏକ weak ଧାରଣା ସହିତ an ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କିମ୍ବା worked ଉଦାହରଣ.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Repair the weakest ଧାରଣା ସହିତ a simpler ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Replace passive rereading ସହିତ retrieval, ମତାମତ, correction, ଓ ବ୍ୟବଧାନୀୟ ସମୀକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ତର reveals ବିଷୟରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ understanding.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request ମତାମତ ଉପରେ the part ସେହି felt uncertain.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: JavaScript ସକ୍ରିୟ ଥିବା ଏକ ଆଧୁନିକ ୱେବ୍ ବ୍ରାଉଜର ଆବଶ୍ୟକ।

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Turn a broad ବିଷୟ into research ପ୍ରଶ୍ନs, search terms, outlines, ଓ source notes।

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ଗବେଷଣା Assistant AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: ଗବେଷଣା Assistant ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍
ମୂଳ ସୂତ୍ର ହରାଇନଥିବା ଭାବେ ଗବେଷଣା କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: ଗବେଷଣା, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, ଓ decision ସହାୟତା ପାଇଁ sharper judgment.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond ପୂର୍ବରୁ asking ପାଇଁ the solution.
ଶିକ୍ଷା କଷ୍ଟକର ମନେହେଲେ ପୁଣି ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ
ଶିକ୍ଷା କଠିନ ଲାଗିଲେ ପୁଣି ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Restate the ସମସ୍ୟା, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ's ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ, କିମ୍ବା provide the smallest ଉପଯୋଗୀ ସଙ୍କେତ.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Retrieval, ମତାମତ, ହୋମୱର୍କ ସଙ୍କେତ, oral ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ଓ game-like ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ସେହି ତିଆରି ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: ଶିକ୍ଷଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ଏବଂ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ
ଭୁଲ୍ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଶୀଘ୍ର ରିଭ୍ୟୁ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: ସମୀକ୍ଷା the ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ/private boundaries behind ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ଓ ସଞ୍ଚିତ ଚାଟ୍.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Rewrite ରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ own words ଓ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କ’ଣ improved କିମ୍ବା weakened.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, ଓ major AI discovery crawlers ଉପରେ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା, while blocking API ରୁଟ୍, admin ରୁଟ୍, ଓ reset flows.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ ଏକ turn at a time, correct gently, ଓ add ଭଲ phrasing.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ ଏକ turn, respond naturally, pause ପାଇଁ ମତାମତ କେବେ ଉପଯୋଗୀ, ଓ retry.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation।

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ Scenario AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ Scenario ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: ସାଙ୍ଗ କିମ୍ବା ସହପାଠୀଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ସମାନ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ, ଚେକ୍-ଇନ୍ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନୋତ୍ତର ସହିତ ଏକ ମିଳିତ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ରିଦମ୍ ଚଲାନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Run a Socratic thinking environment କେଉଁଠି the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Run an adaptive lesson canvas କେଉଁଠି the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ acts early ଓ the interface changes around their ପ୍ରମାଣ of understanding.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: ଫୋକସ୍ ଏବଂ ବ୍ରେକ୍ ସେସନ୍ ଚଲାନ୍ତୁ ଯାହା ଆପଣ ଚାଟ୍, ଟ୍ୟାବ୍ ଏବଂ ମିନି ଆପ୍ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଯିବା ଆସିବା କଲାବେଳେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଚାଲୁ ରହିବ। ଏକ ସେସନ୍ ଶେଷ ହେଲେ ଏହା ବ୍ୟାକଗ୍ରାଉଣ୍ଡରୁ ବାଜିପାରିବ।

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Run କିମ୍ବା reason through the change yourself.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Run spaced retrieval ଅଧିବେଶନ ଓ ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ସମୀକ୍ଷା schedules.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ଉପକରଣ ପାଇଁ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Save the corrected ଭୁଲ as a checklist କିମ୍ବା ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Save the ଶେଷ ଭୁଲ କିମ୍ବା insight as ସମୀକ୍ଷା material.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user conversations ବ୍ୟବହାର ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ identifiers, ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ included ରେ the sitemap କିମ୍ବା AI discovery files, ଓ ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ ହେବା treated as ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ source material.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: ଆପଣ କଣ ଭାବୁଛନ୍ତି ତାହା କୁହନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବନ୍ଧୁ ସହଜ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଲୁକ୍କାୟିତ ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣାଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବେ।

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Schedule କ୍ୱିଜ୍ ଓ ସ୍ମରଣ ପୂର୍ବରୁ rereading so the ଯୋଜନା reveals weak spots.
ମନେ ପକାଇବା ପାଇଁ ସମୟ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Schedule the ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ repetition while the miss ହେଉଛି still fresh.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ଓ CSR pathways ପାଇଁ funded access

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ deployments ପାରେ ହେବା adapted around custom content, କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଓ NCERT-aligned ଶିକ୍ଷା needs କେଉଁଠି appropriate.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ rollouts ପାରେ ହେବା planned around ଛାତ୍ର ଗୋପନୀୟତା, staff oversight, ଓ the ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ boundaries a ଶିକ୍ଷା community needs.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ଓ partners ପାରେ ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ରୁ the ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ product toward tailored, confidential, ଓ subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ପାରେ evaluate inspir through ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ପ୍ରଥମ, then explore tailored AI ଶିକ୍ଷା spaces ସହିତ custom କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ, confidentiality ଯୋଜନା, curriculum needs, ଓ funded access ପଥ.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ପାରେ evaluate ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ପ୍ରଥମ, then discuss tailored କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ, confidentiality ଯୋଜନା, content needs, ଓ funded access.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍‌ମାନେ ନିଜ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ tailored white-labelled AI chat experiences ଦେଇପାରିବେ, NCERT-aligned content ଓ workflows ସହ, partner schools କିମ୍ବା CSR sponsorship ଦ୍ୱାରା funded usage ସହ।

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ପାରେ ଆରମ୍ଭ ଦ୍ୱାରା trying the ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, then move toward a tailored version କେବେ ସେମାନେ need custom କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ, content alignment, କିମ୍ବା funded access.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ପାରେ test ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ ପ୍ରଥମ, then ବ୍ୟବହାର the ସ୍କୁଲ୍ ପୃଷ୍ଠା କୁ explore tailored କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ, confidentiality ଯୋଜନା, NCERT-aligned options, ଓ funded access.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ demonstrations plan କରନ୍ତୁ, variables ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ, outcomes predict କରନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ scientist ପରି evidence ରୁ reasoning କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ବିଜ୍ଞାନ ଲ୍ୟାବ୍ ସାଥୀ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: ବିଜ୍ଞାନ ଲ୍ୟାବ୍ ସାଥୀ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Search engines ପେଜ୍ ଦେଖେ। ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀମାନଙ୍କୁ sequences ଦରକାର। ଏହି paths understanding, homework, exam prep ଓ exploration ପାଇଁ public modes କୁ practical study loops ସହ ଯୋଡ଼େ।

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search ପୃଷ୍ଠା, AI ଉତ୍ତର ଇଞ୍ଜିନ୍, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ସମସ୍ତ get the same promise: ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ, ଉପଯୋଗୀ, canonical entrypoints ସେହି ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ directly inside the ଶିକ୍ଷା experience.
